ab: madraudraw anga ken a kemacu ta sapitj.
en: I forgot to bring the textbook.

ab: kiseljang aken tjanu sun a pacun.
en: I will share it with you.

ab: madraudraw anga ken a kemacu ta siquliqulip.
en: I forgot to bring the eraser.

ab: ku pasedjamai sun.
en: I can lend you.

ab: madraudraw anga sun a kemacu ta sivecivecik?
en: Do you forget to bring your pen?

ab: paqulid, pasedjam aken ta su sivecivecik? maqati?
en: Yes, can you lend me a pen?

ab: anema su kanen ta sun cengelj?
en: What would you like for lunch?

ab: uri keman a ken ta minpaw.
en: I want some bread.

ab: anema su kanen a kaiven?
en: What would you like for dinner?

ab: uri keman aken ta kinsa.
en: I want some rice.

ab: anema su kinan a kenamain?
en: What did you have for breakfast?

ab: na keman anga ken ta qecilu.
en: I ate an egg.

ab: anema su kinan a cengelj?
en: What did you have for lunch?

ab: na keman anga ken ta kuka.
en: I ate the chicken.

ab: vaik amen a tjemadrek ta bulu.
en: Let’s play soccer.

ab: vaivaiku, ku karimau anga sun nu sauni.
ch: B:你先去，我等一下去找你。
en: You go first and I will catch up later.

ab: vaik amen a ljemanguy.
en: Let’s go swimming.

ab: nanguaq, kaciyuri anga vaik.
en: Sure! Let’s go there together.

ab: vaik amen a kivangavang ta bulu.
en: Let’s play ball.

ab: nakuya, vaiki a nan a men a semakuc ta sapitj.
en: No, we have to carry books first.

ab: na gemisagis anga sun ta aljis?
en: Did you brush your teeth?

ab: nekanan semenasenaw a ken ta tjapaq.
en: Not yet. I am doing the dishes.

ab: na menurmur anga sun?
en: Did you rinse out your mouth?

ab: na menuremur anga ken.
en: Yes, I rinsed out my mouth.

ab: na semenaw anga sun ta tjapaq?
en: Did you wash the dishes?

ab: makasenaw anga ken ta tjapaq.
en: I already washed the dishes.

ab: aku sun a inika na pilima?
en: Why didn’t you wash your hands?

ab: nu sauni pilima nga ken.
en: I will wash my hands later.

ab: kemudakuda sun ta sauni?
en: What were you doing just now?

ab: na vaik a ken a karim ta sinsi.
en: I went to meet the teacher.

ab: anema sun kudain nu patjezu i kakitulu?
en: What are you going to do after school?

ab: uri puarut a ken a tjumaq.
en: I will go home directly.

ab: uri kemuda timadju nu pautez a kitulu?
en: What is she doing after school?

ab: uri vaik timadju a zemiyan.
en: She is going to go dancing.
